name: @intentsolutionsio/vibe-guide
description: Non-technical progress summaries for Claude Code work (hides diffs/log noise).

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install vibe-guide\\n  or /plugin install vibe-guide@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
